name: @clawmasons/mason-monorepo
description: Mason — npm-native packaging, governance, and runtime portability for AI agents

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/shared packages/proxy && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp-agent && npm run build:types --workspace=packages/mcp-agent && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-entry && tsc -b packages/cli && npm run build:proxy --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.test:e2e:npm: npx tsx scripts/npm-install-global.ts && MASON_BIN="$(npm root -g)/@clawmasons/mason/dist/cli/bin.js" npx vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
